export default "%  AIfA EU-HOU server: LAB  survey data \n% wanted position:  l, b, RA, DEC, interpolated  NH and beam width FWHM\n% 65.00 ;   0.00 ; 298.80 ;  28.20 ;  0.104E+23;   5.97\n%%LAB     777  datapoints: v_lsr [km/s], T_B [K], freq. [Mhz], wavel. [cm] \n    -127.79      0.08   1421.011   21.09712\n    -126.76      0.10   1421.006   21.09719\n    -125.73      0.11   1421.001   21.09727\n    -124.70      0.12   1420.997   21.09734\n    -123.67      0.14   1420.992   21.09741\n    -122.64      0.16   1420.987   21.09748\n    -121.61      0.18   1420.982   21.09756\n    -120.58      0.21   1420.977   21.09763\n    -119.55      0.25   1420.972   21.09770\n    -118.52      0.30   1420.967   21.09777\n    -117.49      0.36   1420.962   21.09785\n    -116.45      0.44   1420.958   21.09792\n    -115.42      0.55   1420.953   21.09799\n    -114.39      0.70   1420.948   21.09806\n    -113.36      0.88   1420.943   21.09814\n    -112.33      1.11   1420.938   21.09821\n    -111.30      1.36   1420.933   21.09828\n    -110.27      1.63   1420.928   21.09835\n    -109.24      1.89   1420.923   21.09843\n    -108.21      2.14   1420.918   21.09850\n    -107.18      2.37   1420.914   21.09857\n    -106.15      2.56   1420.909   21.09864\n    -105.12      2.74   1420.904   21.09872\n    -104.09      2.89   1420.899   21.09879\n    -103.06      3.00   1420.894   21.09886\n    -102.03      3.09   1420.889   21.09893\n    -101.00      3.17   1420.884   21.09901\n     -99.97      3.24   1420.879   21.09908\n     -98.94      3.33   1420.875   21.09915\n     -97.90      3.45   1420.870   21.09922\n     -96.87      3.61   1420.865   21.09930\n     -95.84      3.82   1420.860   21.09937\n     -94.81      4.10   1420.855   21.09944\n     -93.78      4.44   1420.850   21.09951\n     -92.75      4.87   1420.845   21.09959\n     -91.72      5.37   1420.840   21.09966\n     -90.69      5.95   1420.835   21.09973\n     -89.66      6.57   1420.831   21.09980\n     -88.63      7.21   1420.826   21.09988\n     -87.60      7.84   1420.821   21.09995\n     -86.57      8.46   1420.816   21.10002\n     -85.54      9.09   1420.811   21.10010\n     -84.51      9.76   1420.806   21.10016\n     -83.48     10.49   1420.801   21.10024\n     -82.45     11.37   1420.796   21.10031\n     -81.42     12.46   1420.792   21.10038\n     -80.38     13.82   1420.787   21.10046\n     -79.35     15.45   1420.782   21.10053\n     -78.32     17.36   1420.777   21.10060\n     -77.29     19.52   1420.772   21.10067\n     -76.26     21.89   1420.767   21.10075\n     -75.23     24.37   1420.762   21.10082\n     -74.20     26.87   1420.757   21.10089\n     -73.17     29.27   1420.752   21.10097\n     -72.14     31.45   1420.748   21.10103\n     -71.11     33.32   1420.743   21.10111\n     -70.08     34.80   1420.738   21.10118\n     -69.05     35.83   1420.733   21.10125\n     -68.02     36.41   1420.728   21.10133\n     -66.99     36.55   1420.723   21.10140\n     -65.96     36.32   1420.718   21.10147\n     -64.93     35.82   1420.713   21.10154\n     -63.90     35.09   1420.708   21.10162\n     -62.87     34.14   1420.704   21.10169\n     -61.83     32.95   1420.699   21.10176\n     -60.80     31.51   1420.694   21.10184\n     -59.77     29.81   1420.689   21.10191\n     -58.74     27.86   1420.684   21.10198\n     -57.71     25.75   1420.679   21.10205\n     -56.68     23.63   1420.674   21.10213\n     -55.65     21.64   1420.669   21.10220\n     -54.62     19.87   1420.665   21.10227\n     -53.59     18.36   1420.660   21.10234\n     -52.56     17.07   1420.655   21.10242\n     -51.53     15.90   1420.650   21.10249\n     -50.50     14.79   1420.645   21.10256\n     -49.47     13.72   1420.640   21.10263\n     -48.44     12.69   1420.635   21.10271\n     -47.41     11.73   1420.630   21.10278\n     -46.38     10.84   1420.625   21.10285\n     -45.35     10.02   1420.621   21.10292\n     -44.31      9.30   1420.616   21.10299\n     -43.28      8.66   1420.611   21.10307\n     -42.25      8.10   1420.606   21.10314\n     -41.22      7.63   1420.601   21.10321\n     -40.19      7.26   1420.596   21.10328\n     -39.16      7.00   1420.591   21.10336\n     -38.13      6.84   1420.586   21.10343\n     -37.10      6.77   1420.582   21.10350\n     -36.07      6.77   1420.577   21.10357\n     -35.04      6.82   1420.572   21.10365\n     -34.01      6.94   1420.567   21.10372\n     -32.98      7.15   1420.562   21.10379\n     -31.95      7.44   1420.557   21.10386\n     -30.92      7.81   1420.552   21.10394\n     -29.89      8.29   1420.547   21.10401\n     -28.86      8.89   1420.542   21.10408\n     -27.83      9.59   1420.538   21.10415\n     -26.79     10.39   1420.533   21.10423\n     -25.76     11.27   1420.528   21.10430\n     -24.73     12.23   1420.523   21.10437\n     -23.70     13.29   1420.518   21.10445\n     -22.67     14.46   1420.513   21.10452\n     -21.64     15.78   1420.508   21.10459\n     -20.61     17.22   1420.503   21.10466\n     -19.58     18.76   1420.499   21.10474\n     -18.55     20.33   1420.494   21.10481\n     -17.52     21.84   1420.489   21.10488\n     -16.49     23.19   1420.484   21.10496\n     -15.46     24.34   1420.479   21.10502\n     -14.43     25.32   1420.474   21.10510\n     -13.40     26.20   1420.469   21.10517\n     -12.37     27.01   1420.464   21.10524\n     -11.34     27.80   1420.459   21.10532\n     -10.31     28.60   1420.454   21.10539\n      -9.28     29.51   1420.450   21.10546\n      -8.24     30.66   1420.445   21.10553\n      -7.21     32.09   1420.440   21.10561\n      -6.18     33.84   1420.435   21.10568\n      -5.15     35.90   1420.430   21.10575\n      -4.12     38.31   1420.425   21.10582\n      -3.09     41.18   1420.421   21.10589\n      -2.06     44.65   1420.416   21.10597\n      -1.03     48.76   1420.411   21.10604\n       0.00     53.43   1420.406   21.10611\n       1.03     58.44   1420.401   21.10619\n       2.06     63.64   1420.396   21.10626\n       3.09     69.01   1420.391   21.10633\n       4.12     74.39   1420.386   21.10641\n       5.15     79.40   1420.381   21.10648\n       6.18     83.60   1420.376   21.10655\n       7.21     86.50   1420.372   21.10662\n       8.24     87.95   1420.367   21.10670\n       9.28     87.97   1420.362   21.10677\n      10.31     86.71   1420.357   21.10684\n      11.34     84.49   1420.352   21.10691\n      12.37     81.83   1420.347   21.10699\n      13.40     79.10   1420.342   21.10706\n      14.43     76.30   1420.337   21.10713\n      15.46     73.48   1420.333   21.10720\n      16.49     70.71   1420.328   21.10728\n      17.52     67.94   1420.323   21.10735\n      18.55     65.11   1420.318   21.10742\n      19.58     62.21   1420.313   21.10749\n      20.61     59.26   1420.308   21.10756\n      21.64     56.37   1420.303   21.10764\n      22.67     53.49   1420.298   21.10771\n      23.70     50.52   1420.293   21.10778\n      24.73     47.36   1420.289   21.10785\n      25.76     44.01   1420.284   21.10793\n      26.79     40.52   1420.279   21.10800\n      27.83     36.95   1420.274   21.10807\n      28.86     33.37   1420.269   21.10815\n      29.89     29.83   1420.264   21.10822\n      30.92     26.40   1420.259   21.10829\n      31.95     23.18   1420.254   21.10836\n      32.98     20.25   1420.250   21.10844\n      34.01     17.68   1420.245   21.10851\n      35.04     15.49   1420.240   21.10858\n      36.07     13.64   1420.235   21.10865\n      37.10     12.08   1420.230   21.10873\n      38.13     10.70   1420.225   21.10880\n      39.16      9.45   1420.220   21.10887\n      40.19      8.28   1420.215   21.10894\n      41.22      7.19   1420.210   21.10902\n      42.25      6.18   1420.206   21.10909\n      43.28      5.26   1420.201   21.10916\n      44.31      4.43   1420.196   21.10923\n      45.35      3.70   1420.191   21.10931\n      46.38      3.07   1420.186   21.10938\n      47.41      2.52   1420.181   21.10945\n      48.44      2.05   1420.176   21.10953\n      49.47      1.67   1420.171   21.10960\n      50.50      1.38   1420.167   21.10967\n      51.53      1.13   1420.162   21.10974\n      52.56      0.93   1420.157   21.10982\n      53.59      0.77   1420.152   21.10989\n      54.62      0.64   1420.147   21.10996\n      55.65      0.54   1420.142   21.11003\n      56.68      0.45   1420.137   21.11011\n      57.71      0.39   1420.132   21.11018\n      58.74      0.33   1420.127   21.11025\n      59.77      0.29   1420.123   21.11032\n      60.80      0.25   1420.118   21.11040\n      61.83      0.21   1420.113   21.11047\n      62.87      0.19   1420.108   21.11054\n      63.90      0.17   1420.103   21.11061\n      64.93      0.15   1420.098   21.11069\n      65.96      0.13   1420.093   21.11076\n      66.99      0.11   1420.088   21.11083\n      68.02      0.09   1420.083   21.11090\n      69.05      0.08   1420.079   21.11098\n      70.08      0.07   1420.074   21.11105\n      71.11      0.07   1420.069   21.11112\n      72.14      0.06   1420.064   21.11119\n      73.17      0.05   1420.059   21.11127\n      74.20      0.04   1420.054   21.11134\n      75.23      0.04   1420.049   21.11141\n      76.26      0.04   1420.044   21.11148\n      77.29      0.04   1420.040   21.11156\n      78.32      0.04   1420.035   21.11163\n      79.35      0.03   1420.030   21.11170\n      80.38      0.03   1420.025   21.11177\n      81.42      0.03   1420.020   21.11185\n      82.45      0.03   1420.015   21.11192\n      83.48      0.03   1420.010   21.11199\n      84.51      0.03   1420.005   21.11206\n      85.54      0.03   1420.000   21.11214\n      86.57      0.03   1419.996   21.11221\n      87.60      0.03   1419.991   21.11228\n      88.63      0.03   1419.986   21.11236\n      89.66      0.03   1419.981   21.11243\n      90.69      0.02   1419.976   21.11250\n      91.72      0.02   1419.971   21.11257\n      92.75      0.02   1419.966   21.11265\n      93.78      0.02   1419.961   21.11272\n      94.81      0.03   1419.957   21.11279\n      95.84      0.03   1419.952   21.11286\n      96.87      0.02   1419.947   21.11294\n      97.90      0.02   1419.942   21.11301\n      98.94      0.02   1419.937   21.11308\n      99.97      0.02   1419.932   21.11315\n     101.00      0.02   1419.927   21.11323\n     102.03      0.02   1419.922   21.11330\n     103.06      0.01   1419.917   21.11337\n     104.09      0.01   1419.913   21.11345\n     105.12      0.01   1419.908   21.11352\n     106.15      0.02   1419.903   21.11359\n     107.18      0.02   1419.898   21.11366\n     108.21      0.02   1419.893   21.11374\n     109.24      0.02   1419.888   21.11381\n     110.27      0.01   1419.883   21.11388\n     111.30      0.01   1419.878   21.11395\n     112.33      0.01   1419.874   21.11403\n     113.36      0.02   1419.869   21.11410\n     114.39      0.03   1419.864   21.11417\n     115.42      0.03   1419.859   21.11424\n     116.45      0.02   1419.854   21.11432\n     117.49      0.02   1419.849   21.11439\n     118.52      0.01   1419.844   21.11446\n     119.55      0.01   1419.839   21.11453\n     120.58      0.01   1419.834   21.11461\n"
